chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.S-665 and 666 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 5657/2024. 2. For hearing of main case 01.10.2024. Mr. Zia Dastagir, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Waleed khanzada, Advocate for respondent No.1. Syed Miran Muhammad Shah, AAG. = Learned counsel for petitioner after arguing the case at some length states that if six months’ time is granted to the petitioner to vacate the premises viz. House No.58/16 measuring 160 Sq. yds situated in Sector 11-F, North Karachi Township, Karachi, he would not press these petitions. Learned counsel for landlord/respondent has graciously acceded to this proposal. Accordingly, these petitions are dismissed as not pressed. The petitioner can retain the demised premises for six months from today subject to payment of rent and all other dues. However, on expiry of six months or before that, he shall vacate the premises without further notice. On his failure, the executing court shall issue writ of possession with police aid without a further notice. The petitions ares dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending applications in the above terms. Office to place a copy of this order in connected petition. JUDGE A.K
